violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (Ice Machine) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice Machine is not to be used until unit is cleaned and sanitized. New Violation. Correct By: 11/22/2023

The door to the outside, located in the front and back of store, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 12/22/2023
The gasket located on the walk in cooler door two was not in good repair. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 12/22/2023
The floor in the walk in cooler is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/22/2024
